samples.xml_description:
<module id="pe">
    <description>Implement a Multiplying Accumulator for 32-bit integers.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operations.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset signal. Active-high reset.</input>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand A.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit input operand B.</input>
        <output id="c" width_description="[31:0]">32-bit output representing the accumulated result.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Multiplies inputs a and b, accumulating the result in register c on each clock cycle. Resets to 0 on reset signal.</implementation>
</module>
